mapper.select: SELECT t.*, tm.title AS terms_title, tm.terms_type FROM TERMS_PACKAGES tp INNER JOIN PACKAGE_TERMS pt ON tp.package_id = pt.package_id INNER JOIN TERMS t ON pt.terms_id = t.terms_id INNER JOIN TERMS_MASTERS tm ON t.terms_master_id = tm.terms_master_id WHERE tp.package_type = #{packageType} AND t.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND t.effective_from <= SYSDATE AND (t.effective_to IS NULL OR t.effective_to >= SYSDATE) ORDER BY pt.display_order ASC NULLS LAST
SELECT t.*, tm.title AS terms_title, tm.terms_type FROM TERMS t INNER JOIN TERMS_MASTERS tm ON t.terms_master_id = tm.terms_master_id WHERE t.terms_id = #{termsId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TERMS ( terms_master_id, version, content_html, required_yn, reconsent_required_yn, status, effective_from, effective_to, document_hash, internal_note, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{termsMasterId}, #{version}, #{contentHtml}, #{requiredYn}, #{reconsentRequiredYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DRAFT', #{effectiveFrom}, #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=DATE}, #{documentHash, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{internalNote, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO TERMS_STATUS_HISTORY ( terms_id, previous_status, changed_status, changed_by, changed_reason, changed_at ) VALUES ( #{termsId}, #{previousStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{changedStatus}, #{changedBy, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{changedReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT uta.user_id FROM USER_TERMS_AGREEMENTS uta WHERE uta.terms_id = #{termsId} AND uta.agreed_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TERMS_NOTIFICATION_HISTORY ( user_id, terms_id, notification_type, sent_yn, read_yn, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{termsId}, #{notificationType}, 'N', 'N', SYSTIMESTAMP )
